title: lathyrus sphaericus subsp. angulatus
intro: Lathyrus sphaericus subsp. angulatus, commonly known as the 'Dwarf Pea', is a type of vetch or pea plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus sphaericus subsp. angulatus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which may contribute to reducing the risk of certain diseases. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and provide relief from various health issues.
